figures.caption: Fig. 1: Illustration of the proposed CoVSpec, a communication-aware device-edge collaborative speculative decoding framework for VLM inference.

TABLE I: Performance comparison on VQAv2, MMMU, and MMBench at SNR = 10 dB. Spd., Acc., Comm., and Cost Red. denote the speedup ratio, accuracy, communication cost, and cost reduction percentage, respectively. The best and second-best results are highlighted in bold and underlined, respectively.
